[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0100100000 2
2 0000100001 2
3 0000111100 4
4 0010110000 3
5 0101000110 4
6 1001011111 7
7 0111011110 7

70 1111111101 9

57 0111011110 7 match 7
